Thanks for contributing! A few things that keep the review loop fast:
- Scope the PR tight. One logical change per PR.
- If this ships user-visible behavior in a publishable package, run `pnpm changeset` and commit the resulting .changeset/*.md file.
- Make sure `pnpm test` passes locally (lint guards + vitest).
- See AGENTS.md for house style and the load-bearing constraints.
-->
